name: IFMIS Kenya
description: Kenya Integrated Financial Management Information System for national budget execution and expenditure tracking.
notes: Core system. Real-time integration for budget execution monitoring across all MDAs.

name: Central Bank of Kenya RTGS
description: CBK real-time gross settlement system for government payment processing and interbank settlements.
notes: All government payments and external debt servicing processed through this system.

name: Kenya Revenue Authority iTax
description: KRA iTax system for revenue collection monitoring and SOE tax compliance reporting.
notes: Daily revenue collection data for budget monitoring and SOE compliance dashboard.

name: World Bank Open Data API
description: World Bank open data API for macroeconomic indicators, debt sustainability and development finance benchmarks.
notes: Used for macroeconomic forecasting and debt sustainability analysis.

name: Nairobi Securities Exchange Data Feed
description: NSE market data feed for listed SOE portfolio companies (Safaricom, KCB, Equity Bank).
notes: End-of-day market data sync after exchange close at 15:00 EAT.
